title: Forensic Scene Reconstruction Studies
description: Eight independent reconstruction studies for Forensic Scene Reconstruction, each testing a different visual angle within the same theme.
creative_direction: Eight independent images explore A Prompt Atlas theme for Forensic Scene Reconstruction, testing physics-materials, reasoning-composition, style-transfer with GPT Image 2. through distinct studies that emphasize world-knowledge, structured-layout, photorealism while keeping every image self-contained and ready for the queue.
